riskFloorReasons: new capability: new config key added

causalAutopsy.notes: CMT-1164 inbound/local-transport half. #479+#1032 fixed the OUTBOUND identity-divergence (advertise/resolve by canonical fingerprint). The INBOUND local-delivery path was never fixed: it carries the sender as a NAME while the thread owner is recorded as a FINGERPRINT, so the anti-hijack guard false-isolates legitimate same-machine replies (observed live: Luna's reply to echo, thread 199c20fe). Latent since the local-delivery path predates fingerprint-based owner records.
